name: Territorial Expanse
effect: Increase production of Citadels / Necropolises / Labyrinths (by alignment) based on assistants owned.
formula: (50 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2.5)%, where x is assistants owned

name: Evolutive Mutation
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on highest Labyrinths built this Reincarnation.
formula: floor(3 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is highest Labyrinths this Reincarnation

name: Deep Memory
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on longest game session this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.3 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is longest session this Reincarnation

name: Gold Synthesis
effect: Increase production of Neutral buildings based on coins owned.
formula: (0.2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is coins owned

name: Mitosis
effect: Gain Faceless Assistants based on buildings owned.
formula: floor(0.5 * x ^ 0.5), where x is buildings owned

name: Overgrowth
effect: Increase production based on highest buildings purchased in a single game this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.8 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is highest single-game buildings this Reincarnation

name: Magical Treasure
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on assistants owned.
formula: +(2.5 * x ^ 0.5), where x is assistants owned

name: Abominations
effect: Increase production of assistants based on active spells.
formula: (20 * x ^ 0.9)%, where x is active spells

name: Hive Mind
effect: Increase production based on total time affiliated with Faceless (All Time, persists through Reincarnations).
formula: (x ^ 0.5)%, where x is Faceless time (All Time)

name: Primal Knowledge
effect: Multiplicatively increase FC find chance based on highest Forbidden Libraries this Reincarnation. Grows over time, resets every 15 minutes.
formula: ((t % 900) / 75 * x ^ 0.4)%, t is time this Era, x is highest Forbidden Libraries

name: Forbidden Language
effect: Increase spell durations based on Reincarnations made.
formula: (0.8 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is Reincarnations made

name: Dimension Door
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Maximum Mana this Reincarnation.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is highest Max Mana this Reincarnation
